resources.string:
Ye ek KHAALI TEMPLATE hai — protest se pehle, kisi local lawyer/legal aid/human rights organisation se baat karke isko sahi, up-to-date info se bharo. Jo bhi yahan likhoge wahi offline available rahega (koi internet nahi chahiye padhne ke liye).
1) Emergency contacts - Lawyer/legal aid helpline: ____________________ - Trusted family/friend (yaad rakhna, likhna zaroori nahi): ____________________ - Local human rights org helpline: ____________________
2) Agar detain/arrest ho jaaye — apne lawyer se confirm karo: - Kitne time ke andar magistrate ke saamne pesh karna zaroori hai (apne desh/state ke current kanoon ke hisaab se) — likho: ____________________ - Kisi ko inform karne ka right kaise/kab use karna hai — likho: ____________________ - Phone/device se related apne rights (search/seizure) — apne lawyer se confirm karke likho: ____________________
3) Practical notes (khud verify/fill karo) - Nearest legal aid clinic/office: ____________________ - Agar safe ho to observe/note karne layak cheezein (badge number, time, location) — apne group ke saath decide karo protocol kya hoga - Meeting point / dispersal plan agar group alag ho jaaye: ____________________
Reminder: ye app khud koi legal advice nahi deta — sirf ek jagah hai jahan tumhara APNA verified info offline store ho sake.

Important: Ye general first-aid info hai, doctor/emergency services ka substitute NAHI hai. Jitni jaldi ho sake professional medical help lo, especially agar: saans lene mein serious dikkat, chest pain, behoshi/consciousness kam ho jaana, bahut zyada bleeding, ya koi chemical burn jo aankh/muh ke paas ho.
1) Tear gas / pepper spray exposure — decontamination - Turant ek khuli/upwind jagah pe jao (hawa ki taraf jahan se gas nahi aa rahi). - Contact lenses ho to nikal do (agar surakshit ho) — inke peeche chemical phas sakta hai. - Aankhein baar-baar palko jhapkate hue thanda saaf paani se kam se kam 10-15 minute tak flush karo (aankh ke andar se bahar ki taraf) — agar available ho to saline solution behtar hai plain paani se, lekin paani bhi kaam chala deta hai. - Skin: affected area ko thande paani aur mild soap se dho lo. Rubbing mat karo — isse chemical aur ragadta hai. Contaminated kapde nikaal do agar ho sake (gloves pehen ke, taaki haath contaminate na ho) aur unhe alag bag mein rakho. - Milk ya oil-based cheezein na lagao — recommend nahi kiya jaata, kabhi kabhi jalan aur badha sakti hain. - Agar breathing mein takleef, wheeze, ya chest tightness ho — turant fresh air mein jao aur agar ye kam na ho to emergency medical help lo, khaaskar agar pehle se asthma/lung condition hai. - Baad mein bhi kai ghante tak thodi jalan/khaansi normal ho sakti hai, lekin agar symptoms badhte jaayein ya kam na ho, medical help lo.
2) Common injury basics - Bleeding: clean cloth/gauze se seedha, firm pressure lagao jab tak bleeding kam na ho. Agar khoon bahut zyada/rukta na ho, ya wound bahut deep/bada ho, turant emergency medical help lo — ye first aid usse replace nahi karta. - Cuts/scrapes: agar possible ho to saaf paani se dho lo, saaf cloth/bandage se dhaak do. - Sprain/twist (haath/pair): hilana band karo, agar possible ho to thanda (ice/cold pack, seedha skin pe nahi — kapde mein lapet ke) 15-20 minute lagao, aur us hisse ko upar rakho jaha ho sake. - Behoshi/consciousness kam hona, ya sar pe strong blow lagna: is banda/bandi ko akela mat chhodo, unhe leta do (agar unconscious ho to side pe, taaki ulti se gala block na ho), aur turant emergency medical help lo — ye khud handle karne wali cheez nahi hai. - Breathing na aana ya pulse na milna: agar tumhe CPR training hai to shuru karo aur turant help bulao — is app mein CPR steps nahi diye kyunki hands-on training ke bina galat tarike se try karna khud risk create kar sakta hai; agar training nahi hai, sirf emergency help ke liye jaldi se jaldi bhaago ya kisi trained banda ko dhoondo.
3) General - Group mein jitna ho sake, kam se kam ek aisa banda rakho jisko basic first aid training ho — ye app training ka substitute nahi hai. - Ye reference fixed/offline hai (koi live update nahi) — jaha possible ho, ek proper first-aid course (Red Cross ya local equivalent) karna sabse accha tareeka hai taaki ye jaankari muscle-memory ban jaaye.
